full_text:
Deng Zhong 鄧忠
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Deng Zhong (鄧忠). Died attempting to aid his father. Deng Zhong was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Deng Zhong lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
